description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a test stage and adds a job named molecule which extends the .base_ansible template. In the test stage the molecule job runs the exact shell command: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/tmp/$(basename "${PWD}"):ro -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -w /tmp/$(basename "${PWD}") quay.io/ansible/molecule:2.19 sudo molecule test. The command launches a quay.io/ansible/molecule:2.19 container, mounts the repository read‑only and the Docker socket, sets the working directory, and executes sudo molecule test inside the container. No additional caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
